commands.review_summary:
The branch changes outbound delivery recovery so ambiguous post-send entries without adapter reconciliation remain retry-counted pending entries, updates recovery tests and Discord troubleshooting docs, and edits CHANGELOG.md.

PR surface: Source +3, Tests +24, Docs 0. Total +27 across 4 files.

Reproducibility: Source-reproducible rather than executed: current main moves ambiguous unreconciled entries to failed/, and the PR tests model the two affected recovery states. I did not run tests because this review is read-only and the PR still lacks real behavior proof.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Human and contributor action is needed: add real behavior proof and have maintainers decide whether the pending/backoff recovery behavior is acceptable before landing.

target.title: [codex] Keep ambiguous delivery attempts recoverable
target.body:
## Summary

- Keeps outbound delivery entries in ambiguous post-send states pending when adapter reconciliation is unavailable.
- Preserves the existing no-blind-replay behavior while leaving the entry retryable for later reconciliation/backoff.
- Updates recovery tests, troubleshooting guidance, and changelog coverage for #87544.

## Scope

This is a narrow mitigation for #87544 and intentionally does not close the full issue. The broader transcript-to-provider delivery ledger, Discord reconciliation semantics, and UI/API surfacing still need maintainer design.

## Validation

- pnpm test src/infra/outbound/delivery-queue.recovery.test.ts
- pnpm exec oxfmt --check --threads=1 src/infra/outbound/delivery-queue-recovery.ts src/infra/outbound/delivery-queue.recovery.test.ts
- git diff --check
- pnpm check:changed
target.author: solavrc

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
